directive:
Assemble the pull request description from batch results.

1. Run: koto context get work-on-plan batch_final_view
2. For each child in batch_final_view include: name, outcome, reason (if failed or skipped), reason_source, skipped_because_chain (if skipped)
3. Create or update the PR with gh pr edit
4. Submit pr_status: created with pr_url, or pr_status: creation_failed if the PR cannot be created
